content:
### Premium A La Carte Services Menu for Ulti Tool Media

#### Strategy & Branding Consultation
Description: Tailored marketing strategies, indepth branding consultations, and competitive market analysis to position your brand for success.
Price: $1,000 per session

#### Web Design & Development
Description: Custom website design and development, including ecommerce, responsive design, and performance optimization, to create a strong online presence.
Price: Starts at $5,000 for basic designs; more complex projects will be quoted individually.

#### Graphic Design
Description: Highend graphic design for digital marketing materials, including website graphics, social media posts, and advertising banners.
Price: $500 per design

#### Content Creation
Description: Premium quality content tailored to your brand, including blog posts, articles, and social media content crafted to engage and convert.
Price: $400 per piece

#### SEO & Blog Integration
context: From document: Services and Pricing Menu for Ulti Tool Media — chunk 8 (chunk 8/10)
